activity: Build a Governed Multi-Agent Workflow with Microsoft Foundry
one_line_submission: RecallGuard AI is a governed multi-agent product safety compliance evidence checker built in Microsoft Foundry with a grounded Knowledge Agent, a Code Interpreter Task Agent, a Sequential Workflow, guardrails, traces, and Entra ID Agent ID governance.
